_comment: Per-class runtime-asset budgets, enforced by scripts/assets_pipeline.mjs --check (CI: check:assets). Caps are set ~1.25-1.4x the post-optimization size of the current worst asset in each class: tight enough to catch future bloat, loose enough that a legitimate new piece fits. Bytes are the on-disk .glb; tris is total triangles; texMaxPx is the largest allowed texture edge.
